title: Accelerated Command
salary_benefits: We offer a competitive total remuneration package, paid tax free in Dubai. You can find out more about our airline, our employee benefits and living in Dubai on our careers website.
description:
About the jobJob Purpose

This is a unique opportunity for you to join as an Airbus First Officer on an enhanced salary package with an accelerated command upgrade scenario. You will need to operate the right-hand seat for a minimum of 700 stick hours and successfully complete two Evidence Based Training (EBT) recurrent training modules. Assuming you meet the standards and display the required level of performance, you will then be eligible for accelerated command via an assessment process and an upgrade course.

Total Pay And Benefits Package

- Enjoy a tax-free annual total package of up to AED 970,000 (USD 260,000). This includes:
- Annual take-home cash: AED 445,000 (USD 120,000), comprising annualised basic salary and flying pay
- Monthly take-home cash: AED 37,100 (USD 10,000), based on an average of 85 flying hours
- Company-provided accommodation with utilities
- Education allowance of AED 52,250 for primary and AED 79,750 for secondary education (up to 3 children)
- Annual leave entitlement of 42 calendar days
- Confirmed annual leave tickets for you and your dependents, upgradeable to Business Class
- Access to Emirates Platinum card offering exclusive retail, leisure and services discounts
- Concessional travel benefits for you and eligible dependents
- Provident (pension) scheme employer contribution
- Comprehensive medical, life, and accident insurance
- Eligibility for an annual profit share based on company performance

Qualification

To join our Accelerated Command program, you will need the following experience:

- Minimum of 5,000 hours total flying time (excluding P3, rotary and single/multi-engine piston aircraft) 
- Minimum of 2,000 hours command time on Boeing/ Airbus FBW types 
- Minimum 1,000 hours Airbus FBW
- Airbus FBW type flown within the past 3 years
- Minimum 150 hours in past 12 months on Airbus FBW/Boeing
- Valid ICAO ATPL with matching Authority Class 1 Medical
- ICAO English Level 5 or above 
- Airbus FBW excludes A220

Please make sure you attach these documents to your online application:

- CV
- Passport
- ATPL with the type-rating for the aircraft you currently fly
- Class 1 medical certificate with no limitations (except visual corrections)

Salary & benefits

We offer a competitive total remuneration package, paid tax free in Dubai. You can find out more about our airline, our employee benefits and living in Dubai on our careers website.… more

title: AI Mentor Talent Pool – Contractor Roles
description:
About the jobAbout Us

Udacity is now an Accenture company, and exciting things are happening! 🚀 We are on a mission of forging futures in tech through radical talent transformation in digital technologies. We offer a unique and immersive online learning platform, powering corporate technical training in fields such as Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, Autonomous Systems, Cloud Computing and more. Our rapidly growing global organization is revolutionizing how the enterprise market bridges the talent shortage and skills gaps during their digital transformation journey.

Recognized for its innovative impact, Udacity continues to empower people with the skills they need to secure the jobs they want.

Our School of Artificial Intelligence is committed to providing high-quality upskilling opportunities in this rapidly evolving field. We regularly launch new projects and are seeking experienced mentors to join us as external contractors to support our programs and learners.

As new initiatives arise, we will reach out to qualified candidates within this talent pool to provide details on project scope, expected timelines, and compensation. If you are passionate about tackling meaningful challenges and making a difference we invite you to apply and explore opportunities to collaborate with us.

Example Mentor Roles

- Session Lead - Session Leads are industry experts who share knowledge, inspiration, and real-world insights with Udacity learners through virtual sessions. In this role, you will provide hands-on guidance, address pressing questions, and interact directly with learners in a live setting. Drive learner success through an engaging and supportive learning environment. 
- Tutor - As a tutor, you’ll be at the core of our learner communities, providing essential support and guidance. You will answer content-related questions on our community platform, actively participate in virtual community activities, and help foster meaningful engagement with our learners to stay motivated and on track. 
- Career Coach - Career Coaches play a vital role in empowering learners to achieve their professional goals. In this role, you will provide personalized career guidance through webinars, virtual coaching sessions, and community activities, offering insights on projects, industry best practices, and job-search strategies. Your efforts will help foster a vibrant, career-focused community, motivating learners to approach the job market with confidence and clarity.

You’ll Be An Excellent Fit If You Have

- Proven technical expertise with 3+ years of experience in Artificial Intelligence or Machine Learning
- A passion for mentoring and helping others succeed in their learning
- Excellent interpersonal skills. You enjoy building relationships, communicating effectively, and fostering a positive learning environment 
- A deep understanding of the tech industry and emerging trends in AI and related fields
- The flexibility to work part-time as an external contractor alongside your current commitments

Why should you apply? 

- Make an impact by mentoring and contributing to a vibrant, global learning community
- Showcase your expertise and gain recognition for your technical knowledge
- Learn and network with our global community of mentors while staying ahead of the curve on cutting-edge technologies
- Earn additional income with the flexibility to work on your own schedule

Mentoring at Udacity offers a unique opportunity to make a significant impact on the lives of learners and to contribute to achieving Udacity's mission. 

If you're passionate about learning, technology and want to make a positive impact, we encourage you to apply to become a mentor at Udacity. 

Let's work together to shape the future of tech education!

Compensation at Udacity, an Accenture company, varies depending on a wide array of factors, which may include but are not limited to location, role, skill set, and level of experience. As required by local law, Udacity, an Accenture company, will provide a reasonable range of compensation.

We believe that no one should be discriminated against because of their differences. All employment decisions shall be made without regard to age, race, creed, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, disability status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, citizenship status or any other basis as protected by federal, state, or local law. Our rich diversity makes us more innovative, more competitive, and more creative, which helps us better serve our clients and our communities.

 Accenture Equal Opportunity Statement

Udacity, an Accenture company, is an EEO and Affirmative Action Employer of Veterans/Individuals with Disabilities, and is committed to providing veteran employment opportunities to our service men and women.

title: Advancement Officer
description:
About the jobJob Summary

The Advancement Officer contributes to Ajman University’s fundraising strategy by driving fundraising efforts and strengthening donor and sponsor relationships. Reporting to the Director of Advancement and working closely with the Executive Director of Advancement & Alumni Affairs, the Officer conducts prospect research, prepares proposals, and manages mid-level donor and sponsor portfolios. The role also supports donor stewardship, corporate sponsorships, campaigns, and events, collaborating across offices to ensure fundraising initiatives are effectively coordinated and aligned with institutional priorities.

Duties & Responsibilities

- Identify, cultivate, and secure financial support from individual donors, corporations, and foundations to advance AU’s mission.
- Build and sustain meaningful donor relationships through proactive engagement, solicitation, and stewardship.
- Present fundraising opportunities, clearly communicating the value and impact of donor contributions.
- Conduct comprehensive prospect research to evaluate potential donors’ capacity, interests, and giving priorities.
- Leverage databases and analytical tools to gather, organize, and interpret donor information for targeted outreach.
- Prepare tailored fundraising proposals, sponsorship packages, and related stewardship materials.
- Coordinate and support fundraising campaigns and donor events, including galas, receptions, and campaigns to strengthen engagement and sponsorship outcomes.
- Prepare timely donor acknowledgements, impact reports, and stewardship communications to recognize contributions and demonstrate the results of gifts and sponsorships.
- Maintain consistent communication with donors to provide updates, nurture relationships, and ensure the timely closure of gifts and pledges.
- Monitor fundraising performance, follow up on commitments, and produce accurate, timely progress reports.
- Collaborate with the colleges to identify and advance fundraising opportunities.
- Ensure all fundraising activities comply with AU policies, UAE regulations, and the highest ethical standards.
- Maintain accurate, up-to-date records of donor interactions, pledges, and contributions in AU’s CRM and reporting systems.
- Undertake additional responsibilities as assigned, contributing to the success of Advancement initiatives and the University’s fundraising goals.

Qualifications & Experience

- Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
- Minimum of 3-5 years of relevant experience in fundraising, sales, or business development, ideally within the education or nonprofit sector.
- Proven success in cultivating, soliciting, and securing gifts or sponsorships from individuals, corporations, and foundations.
- Experience in planning and executing fundraising campaigns and donor events.
- Proficiency in both Arabic and English (written and spoken) to effectively engage diverse stakeholders.
- Familiarity with UAE philanthropic trends, corporate giving culture, and/or higher education advancement is an advantage.

Knowledge & Skills

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to build relationships, influence decision-makers, and represent Ajman University with professionalism.
- Demonstrated networking and relationship-building abilities with a track record of donor cultivation and stewardship.
- Proficiency in CRM systems or fundraising software for donor tracking, segmentation, and performance reporting.
- Strong organizational and time-management skills to balance multiple campaigns, deadlines, and events.
- Ability to work independently and collaboratively, demonstrating initiative, adaptability, and effective problem-solving.
- Commitment to professionalism, integrity, and ethical fundraising practices aligned with Ajman University’s mission.

Working Conditions

- Work is primarily performed in a standard office environment.
- The role requires flexibility, with occasional work outside normal business hours, including evenings, weekends, and holidays for alumni events and special engagements.
- May be subject to “on-call” responsibilities in case of urgent matters or emergencies.

Supervision

Reports to: Director of Advancement

title: Manager of Alumni Affairs Office
description:
About the jobJob Summary

The Manager of Alumni Affairs leads the design and implementation of initiatives and campaigns that strengthen AU’s relationship with its graduates in the UAE and worldwide. This role manages alumni councils, chapters, and alumni events, while also developing initiatives in collaboration with AU’s colleges to engage alumni and strengthen their connection to the university. The Manager works closely with the Office of Advancement to identify alumni with the potential to become donors, support cultivation and stewardship efforts, oversee alumni communications and data management, and develop recognition programs that celebrate alumni achievements.

Duties & Responsibilities

- Develop and implement the University’s Alumni Affairs strategy in alignment with institutional goals.
- Provide leadership and direction to the Alumni Affairs team, ensuring delivery of impactful programs.
- Prepare and manage the Alumni Affairs budget, monitoring expenses and optimizing resources.
- Work closely with the Office of Advancement to identify alumni with donor potential and support cultivation and stewardship efforts.
- Build strong alumni relationships and networks, fostering engagement, advocacy, and philanthropic support.
- Manage volunteers and alumni leaders, including the Alumni Council and International Chapters, by supporting their meetings and guiding them to achieve their mission.
- Plan, manage, and deliver major alumni events including conferences, galas, reunions, and gatherings, that strengthen alumni pride and connection to AU.
- Collaborate with colleges to engage alumni in mentorship, advisory roles, and academic programs.
- Oversee alumni communications across newsletters, social media, web, and digital platforms to ensure meaningful engagement.
- Manage the alumni database and CRM systems, ensuring accuracy, segmentation, reporting, and data-driven insights.
- Develop recognition programs that highlight and celebrate distinguished alumni achievements.
- Represent the University at alumni events and external forums to promote AU’s mission and reputation.
- Monitor, evaluate, and report on alumni engagement initiatives to drive continuous improvement.
- Undertake additional responsibilities as assigned, contributing to the overall success of Alumni Affairs and the University.

Qualifications & Experience

- Bachelor’s degree in Business Management, Communications, Public Relations, or a related field.
- Minimum of 7 years of relevant experience, including at least 2 years in a managerial role.
- Proficiency in both Arabic and English (written and spoken) to effectively engage diverse alumni and stakeholders.
- Experience in alumni relations, advancement, public relations, or a related field within higher education or non-profit sectors.

Knowledge & Skills

- Proven ability to develop and implement strategic plans that enhance alumni engagement and institutional advancement.
- Strong leadership and team management skills, with experience guiding staff and volunteers.
- Demonstrated success in planning and executing large-scale events such as conferences, galas, and alumni gatherings.
- Budget management experience with the ability to optimize resources effectively.
- Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build and sustain relationships across diverse constituencies.
- Experience with alumni databases, CRM systems, and digital engagement platforms.
- Knowledge of the higher education sector and alumni engagement best practices.
- Flexible, collaborative, and willing to travel as required to represent the University and engage alumni internationally.

Working Conditions

- Work is primarily performed in a standard office environment.
- The role requires flexibility, with occasional work outside normal business hours, including evenings, weekends, and holidays for alumni events and special engagements.
- May be subject to “on-call” responsibilities in case of urgent matters or emergencies.

Supervision

Reports to: Executive Director of Advancement and Alumni Affairs

- Alumni Coordinator… more

description:
About the jobJob Description

The Department of Marketing and Entrepreneurship at the United Arab Emirates University (UAEU) invites applications for a full-time faculty position at the rank of Assistant/Associate/Professor in Entrepreneurship. The successful candidate will join a scholarly academic environment dedicated to excellence in research, teaching, and community engagement. Key Responsibilities The successful candidate will conduct high-quality research leading to publications in top-tier, refereed journals and will develop and sustain funded research initiatives. Teaching responsibilities include delivering undergraduate and graduate courses in entrepreneurship and related disciplines, employing innovative and practical approaches to enhance student learning. The candidate will also lead and manage the Entrepreneurship Lab, creating hands-on, practical opportunities that integrate academic knowledge with real-world applications. Mentoring students, advising them on academic and professional development, and actively contributing to the ongoing enhancement of the Entrepreneurship program are integral aspects of the role. The candidate will be expected to engage in service activities that promote the growth and reputation of UAEU and its entrepreneurship program. Industry experience in the UAE and internationally is highly valued to ensure the program's practical relevance and quality.

Minimum Qualification

Applicants must have an earned doctorate in the applicable field. The ability to teach undergraduate courses is a must. Industrial and professional experience is a plus.

Preferred Qualification

Applicants must hold a Ph.D. in Entrepreneurship, Business, or a closely related field from an AACSB-accredited institution.

Expected Skills

Applicants must hold a Ph.D. in Entrepreneurship, Business, or a closely related field from an AACSB-accredited institution. They should demonstrate a proven track record of peer-reviewed journal publications or clear evidence of the potential to publish in leading journals if at an early stage of completion of the PhDs. The ability to secure research funding or develop funded research initiatives is essential. Excellence in teaching is required, with a focus on innovative pedagogy and the ability to teach a diverse range of undergraduate and graduate courses. Candidates should demonstrate collegiality and a strong commitment to contributing to the growth of the institution and its broader community. Proficiency in English, the language of instruction and communication, is mandatory.

title: AI Engineer
description:
About the jobTechnology Innovation Institute (TII) is a publicly funded research institute, based in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. It is home to a diverse community of leading scientists, engineers, mathematicians, and researchers from across the globe, transforming problems and roadblocks into pioneering research and technology prototypes that help move society ahead.

This role is part of TII’s Robotics Research Center.

Position Overview We are seeking a highly skilled AI Engineer with deep expertise in Large Language Models (LLMs), Vision-Language Models (VLMs), and agentic model architectures. The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in both research and engineering, with hands-on experience developing, fine-tuning, and deploying advanced AI systems. You will contribute to building scalable, production-ready AI applications, integrating multimodal reasoning, and pushing the boundaries of autonomous intelligent agents.

Key Responsibilities

- LLM/VLM Development & Integration: Design, train, fine-tune, and optimize LLMs and VLMs for real-world
- Agentic AI Systems: Develop and orchestrate autonomous agent frameworks capable of multi-step reasoning, planning, and tool use.
- Engineering & Deployment: Build scalable, low-latency inference systems for large models using frameworks like DeepSpeed, vLLM, TensorRT, or ONNX Runtime. Implement distributed training, model parallelism, and efficient inference pipelines; also optimize deployment for edge devices, GPUs, and cloud-based platforms.
- Research & Innovation: Stay up to date with the latest advancements in LLMs, multimodal models, and autonomous agents. Core Competencies
- AI/ML Expertise o Strong understanding of LLMs, VLMs, transformers, and multimodal architectures. o Experience with fine-tuning, LoRA/QLoRA, quantization, distillation, and evaluation. o Knoledge of neurosymbolic methodologi o Knowledge of reinforcement learning (RLHF, RLAIF) and alignment techniques.
- Agentic Frameworks o Experience with frameworks such as LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGPT, CrewAI, OpenAI Agents, Hugging Face Transformers/Agents. o Ability to design reasoning loops, memory systems, and multi-agent coordination.
- Development Tools & Libraries o Core AI frameworks: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face, OpenAI APIs, DeepSpeed, vLLM. o Supporting tools: Weaviate, Pinecone, FAISS, Milvus (vector databases), Redis, Kafka. o Evaluation/monitoring: Weights & Biases, MLflow, TensorBoard, Evals frameworks.
- Programming Skills o Python – for AI research, prototyping, and deployment pipelines. o C++ – for performance-critical components, model inference optimization, and system integration.
- Systems & Infrastructure o Proficiency with Docker, and AI distributed training systems. o Strong knowledge of CUDA, GPU optimization, and high-performance computing. o Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) and edge deployment strategies. Qualifications
- Master’s, or PhD in Computer Science, AI/ML, Robotics, or related field.
- Proven track record of hands-on work with LLMs, VLMs, or agentic frameworks.
- Experience in productionizing AI systems at scale.
- Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

Preferred (Nice-to-Have)

- Experience with reinforcement learning
- Background in robotics, simulation environments, or embodied AI.
- Publications in AI conference

At TII, we help society to overcome its biggest hurdles through a rigorous approach to scientific discovery and inquiry, using state-of-the-art facilities and collaboration with leading international

institutions. Our rigorous discovery and inquiry-based approach helps to forge new and disruptive breakthroughs in AI, advanced materials, autonomous robotics, cryptography, digital security, directed energy, quantum computing and secure systems.… more

title: Senior Robotics RL Engineer
description:
About the jobTechnology Innovation Institute (TII) is a publicly funded research institute, based in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. It is home to a diverse community of leading scientists, engineers, mathematicians, and researchers from across the globe, transforming problems and roadblocks into pioneering research and technology prototypes that help move society ahead.

This role is part of TII’s Robotics Research Center.

Job Description – Senior Reinforcement Learning (RL) Engineer

Position OverviewWe are seeking a talented Reinforcement Learning Engineer with expertise in developing

and deploying RL solutions for robotics, swarm intelligence, and drone systems. The

ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in both the theoretical RL and the practical

implementation of algorithms in real-world environments. You will design novel RL

architectures, integrate advanced methodologies and build scalable systems capable of

handling complex distributed control problems.

Key Responsibilities

- RL Algorithm Development & Integration: Design, implement, and optimize RL algorithms for robotic platforms, UAV swarms, and autonomous agents. Integrate and implement RL solutions for long-horizon planning and decision-making.
- Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL): Build and evaluate MARL frameworks for coordination, deconfliction, and cooperative decision-making in multi-drone systems.
- Engineering & Deployment: Implement efficient training pipelines for large-scale RL simulations, optimize performance in simulation-to-real transfer for robotics and aerial vehicles
- Research & Innovation:Stay up to date with state-of-the-art RL methodologies Investigate hybrid learning paradigms (e.g., neurosymbolic methods, modelbased/model-free hybrids).

Core Competencies

- Reinforcement Learning Expertise
- Strong understanding of policy-gradient methods, Q-learning, actor-critic frameworks, and hierarchical RL.
- Hands-on experience with MARL, federated learning, centralized vs decentralized control, and memory-augmented policies
- Knowledge of sim2real techniques, domain randomization, and transfer learning for robotics.
- Development Tools & Libraries
- RL frameworks: Ray RLlib, Stable Baselines3, and others.
- Simulation environments: PyBullet, Isaac Gym, Gazebo, MuJoCo, AirSim.
- AI frameworks: PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX.
- Programming Skills
- Python – primary language for RL research, prototyping, and experimentation.
- C++ – for performance-critical components, robotics middleware integration (e.g., ROS2), and real-time control.- Systems & Infrastructure
- Proficiency with Docker, distributed training systems, and GPU clusters.
- Familiarity with CUDA, and large-scale simulation pipelines.
- Experience deploying RL models in robotics middleware (ROS2, PX4, MAVSDK).

Qualifications

- Master’s or PhD in Computer Science, Robotics, AI/ML, or related field.
- Proven track record of implementing RL algorithms for robotics or UAV applications.
- Strong expertise in multi-agent systems, swarm robotics, and real-world control.
- Experience bridging simulation and real-world deployment.
- Excellent problem-solving ability and research-driven mindset.

Preferred (Nice-to-Have)

- Experience with safety-aware or constrained RL for critical systems.
- Background in distributed optimization, graph-based learning, or networked

systems.

- Contributions to open-source RL or robotics frameworks.
- Publications in AI/robotics conferences

title: [Expired] UAE – Fully Funded PhD in Artificial Intelligence at United Arab Emirates University
description:
About the job⛔ This position is no longer available.

University: United Arab Emirates University

Country: United Arab Emirates

Deadline: 2025-10-14

Fields: Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electrical Engineering, Data Science, Software Engineering

Are you passionate about advancing the future of smart cities through groundbreaking research in Artificial Intelligence, Internet of Things, or Smart Healthcare? Do you aspire to contribute to sustainable urban solutions and technological innovation while earning a fully funded PhD? If so, the Intelligent Distributed Computing & Systems (INDUCE) Lab at United Arab Emirates University (UAEU) offers an exceptional opportunity to realize your academic ambitions.

United Arab Emirates University (UAEU) is the first and foremost national university in the United Arab Emirates, renowned for its commitment to academic excellence, innovative research, and fostering a vibrant international community. Located in Al Ain, a picturesque city known for its rich cultural heritage and modern infrastructure, UAEU consistently ranks among the top universities in the region. The university offers a dynamic academic environment, state-of-the-art facilities, and strong industry partnerships, making it an attractive destination for ambitious scholars from around the globe. The United Arab Emirates itself is a rapidly developing country at the crossroads of Asia, Africa, and Europe, offering a high quality of life, safety, and a thriving multicultural society. Studying at UAEU not only provides access to world-class research resources but also immerses students in a forward-looking nation committed to technological progress and sustainable development.

Research Topic and Significance

The fully funded PhD positions are based within the Intelligent Distributed Computing & Systems (INDUCE) Lab, which is part of the Department of Computer Science & Software Engineering in the College of IT at UAEU. The research focus centers on Artificial Intelligence for Smart Cities, with particular emphasis on Sustainable & Efficient Agentic AI, Smart Healthcare, Smart Transportation, Internet of Vehicles (IoV), Edge/Cloud Computing, IoT, and data-driven systems. As cities worldwide face increasing challenges related to population growth, resource management, and sustainability, innovative AI-driven solutions are essential for building resilient and intelligent urban environments. The research conducted at INDUCE Lab not only addresses urgent societal needs but also contributes to the global body of knowledge in AI, IoT, and smart systems, positioning graduates at the forefront of technological transformation.

Project Details

PhD candidates will join the INDUCE Lab under the guidance of Dr. Leila Ismail, a respected leader in intelligent distributed systems and AI applications. The lab provides a collaborative research environment, access to advanced computational resources, and opportunities to engage with interdisciplinary projects spanning smart healthcare, transportation, and urban technology. The INDUCE Lab actively collaborates with industry and government partners, ensuring that research outcomes have real-world impact and relevance. Successful candidates will be expected to contribute to high-quality publications and participate in the vibrant academic life of the College of IT at UAEU.

Candidate Profile

The ideal applicants for these fully funded PhD positions will demonstrate the following:

– Strong motivation to pursue advanced research in Artificial Intelligence, Smart Cities, IoT, or related fields.

– Academic background in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Data Science, or closely related disciplines.

– Evidence of research capability, ideally with publications in ranked journals.

– Proficiency in relevant technical areas such as agent-based AI, edge/cloud computing, Internet of Vehicles, or data-driven systems.

– Excellent academic record, with GPAs for both Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees included in the CV.

– Commitment to contributing to innovative and impactful research projects.

– Strong communication skills and an ability to work both independently and collaboratively.

Application Process

Application deadline: 14 October 2025.

Prospective candidates must first review the admissions eligibility criteria for the PhD program at UAEU, available at:

https://lnkd.in/gxGyP2uY

If eligible and with publications in ranked journals, applicants should prepare a CV (including GPAs), and transcripts of Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees. Applications should be submitted as instructed in the official advertisement.

Please refer to the official advertisement for application details.

For further information and updates, see the original LinkedIn post by Dr. Leila Ismail:

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/dr-leila-ismail-262a771_phdresearch-phd-ai-activity-7383109685312155649-w-aO

title: Community Lead
description:
About the jobShaping the Next Gen Schools

We’re on a mission to radically change the way students learn. We believe in solving hard problems, and we play to win—we measure progress by revenues, students, and learning gains. Our approach? Build high-performing teams, giving them the freedom to dream big and execute boldly.

Today, we’re building the next generation of schools in Saudi Arabia. We believe every student deserves world-class teachers. And to make it happen, we’re reimagining everything about education: from cutting-edge tech to peer learning and physical spaces that spark curiosity.

Hybrid brings digital star teachers directly into school buildings, and amplifies the experience through peer to peer learning and AI. We ran this model for a year with two schools, and the results were so overwhelming that we expanded to 18 private and 10 public schools in our second year of operations. The verdict is clear: students don't just tolerate hybrid, they love it.

Learn more about us:

- 10+ Years of Impact: Started with a simple idea—access to the best teachers shouldn’t be a luxury, and learning should energize, not drain you.
- Market Leaders: 14 million students (and counting) use Noon across Middle East, Egypt, and Pakistan to ace high-stakes exams like Qudurat & Tahsili.
- Now: We’re laser-focused on reinventing schools in Saudi Arabia. We’re accelerating rapidly, well-funded, and profitable.
- Office: Full-time, Riyadh-based. We’ve got a sweet office near the Boulevard, and we’d love to have you in it.

The Role:

As Community Lead, you own the story and community around Noon schools.

You’ll report to the Head of Experience, and work closely with School Leads, Supervisors, and Marketing/Comms to:

- Make sure parents always know “where my child is” and “what’s next”,
- Design student activities that bring Noon’s values to life,
- Create simple, beautiful communication (reports, WhatsApp, posters) that families can actually read and use.

You turn Noon’s culture into real experiences: events, reports, and messages that families can feel.

What You’ll Do

- Parent communication & reports

- student progress and reports,
- major announcements and reminders (exam dates, Parent Day, etc.).
- Make sure communication is:
- clear (parents understand),
- simple (no jargon),
- on time (not last-minute surprises).
- Work with Data & Student Success to:
- keep reports accurate and actionable,
- add simple guidance on how parents can support at home.
- Parent engagement & events
- Design and program parent-facing events:
- Parent Days at each campus,
- small seminars/webinars about exams, study skills, and teenage life.
- Shape the experience of these events:
- flows, activities, materials, and follow-up.
- Coordinate with School Leads so events feel:
- welcoming, well-structured, and worth parents’ time.
- Student life & culture activation
- Design and coordinate student activities and clubs that:
- align with Noon’s values,
- build skills (public speaking, leadership, collaboration),
- grow a sense of belonging.
- Create simple toolkits (guides, templates, posters) so campuses can run activities locally; day-to-day logistics stay with School Leads.
- Capture and share stories:
- photos, highlights, and wins (e.g., monthly newsletter or “community highlights”).
- Manage online communities (Discord, WhatsApp) by:
- defining which channels we use,
- what content goes where, and
- How often we talk to students and parents.
👀What We’re Looking For:

- 0- 3 years of experience in community, communications, events, student affairs, or a related field
- Strong Arabic writing skills:
- WhatsApp messages, emails, simple reports
- Creative eye for design:
- can use Canva / PowerPoint to create simple, clean visuals,
- comfortable working with designers when needed
- Experience designing and running events or activities (for parents, youth, or communities)
- Comfortable working with school staff and students:
- listening, collecting feedback, and turning insights into next steps
- A natural communicator:
- can explain things simply,
- can get people excited and onboard
Nice to have:

- Experience in education, youth programs, or NGOs
- Experience managing online communities (WhatsApp, Discord, social groups)
- Comfortable in both Arabic and English

About the jobDescription

Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence (MBZUAI) is looking for passionate and highly motivated Faculty. The successful candidates will be responsible for delivering high-quality instruction, mentoring students, contributing to curriculum development, and actively engaging in interdisciplinary research. Faculty members will also have the opportunity to collaborate with leading AI researchers, work on cutting-edge projects, and contribute to the university's growth as a hub for AI excellence.

The Department of Machine Learning is expanding and we invite candidates at all levels (Assistant, Associate and Full Professor) to apply.

The Department of Machine Learning undertakes rigorous, high-impact, and original research. Research topics include, but are not limited to; machine learning for large models, trustworthy AI, explainable AI, deep learning, reinforcement learning, optimization, collaborative learning, representation learning, theoretical machine learning, and causality.

About MBZUAI – A Global Leader in AI Research and Education

MBZUAI is the world’s first university dedicated exclusively to AI and is rapidly emerging as a global leader in the field. Since its establishment in 2020, MBZUAI has grown into a top-ranked AI institution, currently hosting 80+ world-class faculty and 330+ graduate students and ranking among the top 10 AI universities worldwide.

With ambitious plans to expand from 8 to over 20 AI departments and grow its faculty from 84 to 300 by 2030, MBZUAI is on a fast-track growth trajectory. By integrating academia, industry, and government collaboration, we are driving AI innovation to address real-world challenges in healthcare, sustainability, and beyond.

Why Join MBZUAI?

- Top-Tier Compensation: Competitive salaries aligned with leading global academic institutions
- Funding: MBZUAI empowers researchers with resources and academic freedom, fostering groundbreaking AI advancements in an environment of innovation and independent inquiry.
- Exceptional Benefits:
- Comprehensive health & life insurance
- Relocation support for international faculty
- State-of-the-Art Research Facilities: Cutting-edge AI labs and high-performance computing
- Live in Abu Dhabi: World’s safest city, year-round sunshine, rich culture, and modern amenities
- Industry & Government Collaborations: Work with top AI researchers, leading tech firms, and policymakers
Qualifications

This position requires a PhD in Computer Science or a closely related field. Candidates should have demonstrated excellence in conducting innovative and impactful research, and an interest in mentoring students.

Application Instructions

To Apply For This Position, Please Submit The Following

- Cover letter
- Curriculum Vitae
- Statement of research vision and interests
- Statement of teaching philosophy and experience
- List of publications
- Reference letters or the names and contact details for three referees (where referee details are provided, each referee will be contact to upload their reference letters via Interfolio)

MBZUAI's mission includes fostering a diverse academic community. MBZUAI is an equal opportunity employer. The university actively recruits faculty from around the world, aiming to create an international and inclusive environment that reflects a wide range of cultures and perspectives.

Be a part of AI’s future – apply today at MBZUAI!

description:
About the jobNYU Abu Dhabi Community Programs oversee multiple initiatives, including the Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Community Programs, which consist of the Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Scholars Program and the NYU Abu Dhabi Summer Academy. In addition, NYU Abu Dhabi Community Programs administer the Arab Film Studio Young Filmmakers Workshop and the NYU Abu Dhabi PhD Pathways Program.

The Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Scholars Program offers a select cohort of talented university students access to specially designed courses, lectures, leadership experiences, networking, and graduate school counseling. We admit scholars from among the most outstanding students at the three federal UAE universities: Higher Colleges of Technology, the United Arab Emirates University, and Zayed University. The Scholars Program has been developed in close consultation with His Highness Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, Her Highness Sheikha Mariam bint Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, UAE federal universities, and New York University Abu Dhabi.

The NYU Abu Dhabi Summer Academy is an 18-month university preparation program designed to enhance the academic profiles of highly motivated Emirati high school students. The program features intensive instruction in Leadership and Public Speaking, Critical Thinking and Writing, Mathematical Reasoning for the Sciences, College Readiness and Success, and IELTS Preparation over the course of two summers and an intervening academic year.

The Arab Film Studio Young Filmmakers Workshop, a collaboration between Image Nation Abu Dhabi and NYU Abu Dhabi, is a three-week program for Emirati high school students that enables and enhances filmmaking skills. Participants from across the UAE are exposed to the teachings and experience of leading industry professionals. From screenwriting, and directing to camera and post-production, the three weeks come to a close with a screening of a collection of short films that are written and directed by the participants.

The NYUAD PhD Pathways Program, is a first of its kind in the UAE, NYUAD’s PhD Pathways Program aims to address the challenge of underrepresentation of Emirati PhDs and professors in higher education, through enhanced and early access to research experience, mentorship, skill acquisition, exploration of research careers, and graduate school preparation.

Principal Responsibilities

The Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Scholars Program (SMSP)

- Serve as a Public Speaking and Public Presentation instructor or Teaching Assistant as required
- Lead the coordination and organization of guest speakers, leadership activities, and workshops. This includes inviting distinguished leaders or speakers, arranging their visits, and planning engaging leadership activities to enhance the learning experience for the scholars during experiential learning weekends or as required, according to the SMSP academic calendar.
- Work on the existing curriculum, assess its effectiveness, and refine it as necessary to ensure alignment with program objectives. Actively contribute to the ongoing development of innovative instructional materials and strategies aimed at enhancing leadership, public speaking, and public presentation skills among students
- Support recruitment and student selection of the next SMSP cohort
- Assist with and actively participate in programming for the international trip, including but not limited to supervising students during travel
- Support the success of SMSP alumni at NYUAD

The NYU Abu Dhabi Summer Academy (SA)

- Serve as a Leadership and Public Speaking (LPS) instructor
- Lead the coordination and organization of guest speakers, leadership activities, and workshops. This includes inviting distinguished leaders, arranging their visits, and planning engaging leadership activities to enhance the learning experience
- Lead and Collaborate closely with other Summer Academy instructors to ensure seamless delivery of the LPS curriculum, fostering a cohesive learning experience for students. This involves coordinating lesson plans, sharing resources, and exchanging best practices to maintain consistency and coherence across instructional sessions. Additionally, engage in regular communication and collaboration meetings to address any challenges, adapt teaching strategies as needed, and enhance the overall effectiveness of the curriculum delivery
- Assist in supervising students during co-curricular activities and trips
- Work on the existing curriculum, assess its effectiveness, and refine it as necessary to ensure alignment with program objectives. Actively contribute to the ongoing development of innovative instructional materials and strategies aimed at enhancing leadership and public speaking skills among students
- Support recruitment and student selection for the next SA cohort
- Support the success of SA alumni at NYUAD

The NYUAD PhD Pathways Program

title: IT System Trainer
description:
About the jobJob ID: 113617 

The Leonardo DRS Land Electronics business provides C4I Network computing and integrated situational awareness, as well as state-of-the-art embedded diagnostics, vehicle power management and combat vehicle integration products and services.

Job Summary

We are seeking a knowledgeable and experienced IT System Trainer for a mission critical information technology system used by a military organization with proven training delivery capabilities combined with solid information technical skills. This role is responsible for delivering comprehensive training to end users on the operational and technical aspects of the system. The Trainer will act as a bridge between customer’s personnel and the technical teams, ensuring that users fully understand how to operate, manage, and maintain system components in accordance with military procedures and mission requirements. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience in training in military or government operations, an understanding of operational workflows, and the ability to translate technical concepts into clear, practical training sessions tailored for customer’s users. This position may require occasional travel to remote sites within UAE.

Job Responsibilities

- Deliver practical training to customer’s personnel on system operation, basic administration, routine maintenance tasks, system startup/shutdown, hardware replacement, and configuration procedures.
- Develop and maintain training materials such as user guides, SOPs, presentations, and step-by-step instructions based on operational requirements and system updates.
- Provide scenario-based training that reflects real operational workflows and procedures.
- Assess trainee performance, identify skill gaps, and provide additional guidance or refresher sessions as needed.
- Act as a liaison between customer operational personnel and IT engineering teams to ensure training content reflects actual system behavior, operational needs, and recent changes.
- Gather feedback from users to enhance training effectiveness and incorporate lessons learned into updated training content.
- Support users post-training when new features, updates, or operational changes require additional instruction.
- Ensure all training is aligned with customer’s standards, operational protocols, and system security practices.

Technical Skills Required

- Ability to translate operational requirements and operational procedures into clear, practical system training for users.
- Solid understanding of IT fundamentals including server hardware, basic maintenance, and troubleshooting.
- Working knowledge of networking basics (TCP/IP, VLANs, routing/switching) as applied to system nodes.
- Familiarity with Windows and Linux systems, virtualization concepts, and basic administration (VMware experience preferred).
- Ability to explain technical and operational concepts to personnel of different ranks and technical backgrounds.
- Strong documentation skills with experience creating SOPs, step-by-step guides, and training materials tailored for customer operations.
- Comfortable delivering training in classroom settings, or at remote operational sites.
- Strong interpersonal skills, disciplined work approach, and comfortable with customer interaction.
- Military or government operations experience with understanding operational workflows is desirable.
- Familiarity with systems such as AIS, GPS, Radars, Radio communications, and cartography and navigation systems is desirable.

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in information technology, Engineering, or a related technical field.
- Proven experience in technical training, or instructional roles, better if within military or government settings.
- Strong problem-solving skills, adaptability, and the ability to work independently or as part of a team.
- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, fluent Arabic speakers are desirable to engage effectively with the customer’s personnel at all levels.
- Military background or experience in military operations is desirable.

Taking care of our people is a top priority at Leonardo DRS. We are proud to offer competitive salaries and comprehensive benefits, including medical, dental, and vision coverage, a company contribution to a health savings account, telemedicine, life and disability insurance, legal insurance, and a 401(k) savings plan. We champion wellness programs that focus on physical, emotional, and financial well-being. We develop our talent by offering programs and activities to support career-growth, professional development, and skill enhancement. And we understand there is more to life than work, and the importance of offering flexible work schedules with our 9/80 program, competitive vacation, health/emergency leave, paid parental leave, and community service hours.

- Some employees are eligible for limited benefits only

Leonardo DRS, Inc. and its subsidiaries provide equal opportunities to all

title: UAE-Genius
description:
About the jobSummary

Apple Retail is where the best of Apple comes together. We bring our expertise to help people do what they love, delivering an only-at-Apple experience. At Apple, we believe inclusion is a shared responsibility and we work together to foster a culture where everyone belongs and is inspired to do their best work.

As a Genius, you combine extensive functional troubleshooting skills with an ability to inspire excitement for Apple’s products and services. You deliver exceptional service and empower customers to get the most out of their Apple products and services. A Genius makes sure customers are educated about repair options and Apple offerings, and performs repairs on all Apple products serviced in the store.

A Genius excels in repairing relationships with customers and demonstrates the high standard of service and support in our retail stores. You enhance team knowledge by modeling exceptional service and educating and mentoring team members.

Description

Have extensive knowledge and stay up to date on all Apple products, services, and Genius Bar repair processes and procedures to support efficient and high-quality repairs.

Support customers having Apple product or software issues with care and empathy, using all tools and resources provided by Apple.

Troubleshoot, diagnose, repair, and resolve service concerns for Apple hardware and software.

Provide excellent service to Apple customers by seeking to understand their needs, identifying ownership opportunities, presenting product and service recommendations, and educating customers on relevant ways to buy.

Work with team leaders to identify recurring repair problems and other service concerns, and make sure that feedback is provided to Apple.

Use extensive knowledge of hardware and software components to identify where technical concerns may originate from and educate others on the team.

Serve as a Mentor, resource, and positive role model for Genius Bar team members.

Support leadership in providing timely resolution to customer escalations.

Perform other tasks as needed, including but not limited to supporting customer-facing activities on or off the sales floor.

Contribute to an inclusive environment by respecting each other’s differences and having the curiosity to learn.

Demonstrate Apple’s values of inclusion and diversity in daily activities.

Minimum Qualifications

- You should:
- Be available to work a schedule based on business needs that may include nights, weekends, and public holidays in the retail store, and reliably attend work as scheduled, in line with local laws and subject to any approved accommodations.
- Have experience in retail or sales, or related work experience.
- Possess the visual inspection and fine motor skills to safely perform hardware repairs.
- Have experience troubleshooting hardware and software issues in a customer service environment.

Preferred Qualifications

- You can:
- Demonstrate technical expertise of Apple products and services, including repairing devices.
- Analyze problems and follow troubleshooting steps to identify the root cause of a technical issue.
- Navigate customer service issues with care and strong interpersonal skills. 
- Apply an action-oriented mindset and sense of motivation to do what’s best for the customer and Apple, often anticipating and adjusting for problems and roadblocks.
- Work in a fast-paced environment, often under tight deadlines and pressure, while supporting multiple customers or hardware repairs at the same time.
- Communicate effectively and tailor your communication style to different audiences.
- Collaborate and motivate across the store and and among key partners to achieve individual and overall team goals.
- Support and educate the broader team by sharing knowledge, experiences, and insights.
- Frequently handle, lift, and move merchandise safely.

At Apple, we’re not all the same. And that’s our greatest strength. We draw on the differences in who we are, what we’ve experienced, and how we think. Because to create products that serve everyone, we believe in including everyone. Therefore, we are committed to treating all applicants fairly and equally. We will work with applicants to make any reasonable accommodations.

title: Community Officer
location: Al Dhafra, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
description:
About the jobAbout Flat6Labs

Flat6Labs is the leading entrepreneurial ecosystem builder in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region, with multiple offices across the region and operations in more than fifteen countries. Supporting entrepreneurs at various stages, Flat6Labs collaborates with leading partners to run renowned startup programs, strengthen entrepreneurship in emerging markets, and provide expert advisory services to startups, corporates, and governments.

Since its launch in 2011 in Cairo, Flat6Labs has supported over 8,000 entrepreneurs in Africa, the Levant, and the GCC regions through tailored programs and extensive support services, partnering with global stakeholders.

For more information, visit www.flat6labs.com

About The Role

The Community Officer is responsible for building, activating, and sustaining a high-performing entrepreneurial community within the partner-operated campus.

This role is the connective tissue between founders, partners, service providers, and program teams. You ensure the campus is not just operational, but alive, relevant, and delivering real value.

This role is open to UAE Nationals only, in line with Emiratization objectives.

Contract Type: 1-year fixed-term contract

Key Responsibilities

Community Engagement & Ecosystem Activation

- Build and nurture a strong, inclusive startup and innovation community within the campus
- Design and execute a year-round calendar of engagement activities (networking sessions, founder meetups, office hours, fireside chats, workshops, demo days)
- Lead onboarding and welcome sessions for new founders, tenants, and visitors to ensure smooth integration into the community
- Maintain regular engagement with community members to understand needs, challenges, and opportunities
- Capture community feedback and insights to inform programming decisions and improve the overall campus experience

Programming & Event Support

- Support the delivery of in-house and partner-led programs through coordination, logistics, and on-ground execution
- Act as the primary on-site point of contact for participants, mentors, speakers, and partners during programs and events
- Track attendance, engagement levels, and participant feedback across all activities
- Ensure programs and events meet agreed quality standards and align with strategic objectives

Partner & Stakeholder Coordination

- Support day-to-day coordination with ecosystem partners, including corporates, government entities, academia, service providers, and innovation partners
- Assist in the execution of co-designed activities such as hackathons, bootcamps, innovation challenges, and networking events
- Maintain partner engagement trackers and contribute to regular updates shared with internal teams and partners

Campus & Member Experience Support

- Support smooth day-to-day community operations to ensure a welcoming, professional, and well-managed campus environment
- Coordinate space usage for community activities, events, and meetings as needed
- Act as a first point of contact for community-related inquiries and support requests, escalating issues when required

Reporting & Performance Tracking

- Maintain accurate records of events, activities, attendance, and engagement metrics
- Support the preparation of monthly and quarterly reports covering community engagement KPIs and qualitative impact
- Assist in conducting surveys and collecting feedback to assess satisfaction and service quality

Requirements

Must-Have

- Based in Al Dhafra or willing to work on-site in Al Dhafra full-time
- Due to program and partner requirements, this role is open to UAE Nationals only
- Bachelor's degree in Business, Communications, Public Relations, Entrepreneurship, or a related field
- 1-3 years of experience in community engagement, programs, events, hubs, accelerators, or ecosystem-focused roles
- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, comfortable engaging founders, partners, and senior stakeholders
- Fluent in Arabic and English (spoken and written)
- Highly organized, proactive, and comfortable working in fast-paced, on-ground environments

Nice-to-Have

- Experience working in startup ecosystems, innovation hubs, accelerators, or youth-focused initiatives
- Strong event coordination skills and a hands-on, solutions-oriented mindset
- Ability to translate community insights into actionable improvements (not just "noted")

- Founders and partners who feel supported, connected, and eager to stay involved
- Clear reporting, clean coordination, and zero chaos energy

title: Innovation Lead
description:
About the jobRole Overview:

Safqah Capital is a dynamic, CMA-licensed fintech platform specializing in Sharia-compliant financing solutions for real estate developers. The Innovation Lead owns a full product–market lifecycle inside Safqah’s New Initiatives Unit. You will build zero to one products that solve real pain points for developers and investors—such as slow unit exits, feasibility creation, data-driven land sourcing, or new investment channels. You will take an initiative from raw insight → MVP → revenue → product-market fit, then hand it over to the core team and move on to the next high-leverage opportunity. This is a role for someone with founder energy, product taste, analytical depth, and commercial grit—someone who is comfortable moving from zoning laws and underwriting to user interviews, Figma prototypes, pricing models, compliance coordination, and GTM execution in the same day

Key Responsibilities:

1.Problem Discovery & Strategy

- Identify high-friction pain points in real estate development and investing
- Conduct discovery research, interviews, and rapid insights gathering to articulate sharp problem statements
- Prioritize opportunities using data, impact sizing, and feasibility considerations2.MVP Design & Experimentation

- Lead the creation of lean, testable MVPs with the smallest team necessary (Engineer + Product/UI/UX)
- Define clear hypotheses, assumptions, and experiments based on the market context provided in the assessment (e.g., slow sell-through, buyer-side frictions)
- Leverage Safqah’s internal stack:
- o AI Layer (market & financial analysis)
- o Data Intelligence Layer (market insights & forecasts)
- o Arranging Engine (automated financing structures)
- o Safeguard Engine (feasibility, scoring, risk)
- o Platform channels & ecosystem partners3.Product & Commercial Ownership

- Own the P&L, unit economics, activation, retention, and conversion funnels
- Design business models (pricing, take rate, success fees, subscription models)
- Structure pilots, pre-commercial agreements, and early paid contracts4.Execution & Delivery

- Build fast prototypes, iterate behind feature flags, and launch revenue-generating MVPs
- Track SLAs from developer requests to listing go-live (as noted in deliverables)
- Ensure compliance with regulatory, licensing, and data rules5.Cross-Functional Leadership

- Assemble and lead small, high-speed squads
- Coordinate deeply with legal, compliance, arranging, engineering, and design
- Drive alignment, solve blockers quickly, and communicate priorities clearly6.Handover & Scaling

- Document learnings, operational workflows, risks, and instrumentation
- Prepare runbooks, dashboards, and KPIs
- Transition validated products to core units for scaling

Technical Skills:

- Product strategy and zero-to-one product development
- MVP experimentation and hypothesis-driven execution
- Financial modeling, underwriting, and unit economics
- GTM strategy, pricing models, and revenue ownership
- Regulatory and compliance coordination
- Cross-functional leadership and rapid execution

Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Engineering, Finance, Economics, Computer Science, or a related field
- Master’s degree (MBA or equivalent) is a strong plus, especially with a focus on strategy, entrepreneurship, or real estate

Experience:

- 7–10 years of experience in product management, innovation, or venture building, preferably within real estate, fintech, or proptech
- 3–5 years in a senior or leadership role, owning end-to-end product or initiative lifecycles
- Hands-on experience taking products from zero → MVP → revenue → product-market fit.
- Experience working in regulated environments, coordinating with legal, compliance, and licensing stakeholders
- Strong commercial exposure, including pricing, unit economics, P&L ownership, and GTM execution… more

title: Manager, Interdisciplinary Applied Research and Innovation
description:
About the jobThe Manager, Interdisciplinary Applied Research and Innovation will be responsible to lead strategic vision for applied research and innovation development under Qatar Foundation’s Multiversity Framework by advancing initiatives that address grand societal, regional, and global challenges in alignment with the strategic priorities of the QF Higher Education Division

Key Responsibilities:

- Develop and lead a strategic vision for interdisciplinary applied research and innovation under the Multiversity Framework to address local, community, and regional priorities 
- Establish rigorous applied-research frameworks that move projects from problem framing and field research through prototyping, validation, and policy/practice-oriented or materials-based outputs
- Design, curate, and oversee interdisciplinary applied research programs, cohorts, and project cycles that integrate systems thinking, human-centered design, data-informed inquiry, and translational research methodologies

description:
About the jobAbout Mistral

At Mistral AI, we believe in the power of AI to simplify tasks, save time, and enhance learning and creativity. Our technology is designed to integrate seamlessly into daily working life.

We democratize AI through high-performance, optimized, open-source and cutting-edge models, products and solutions. Our comprehensive AI platform is designed to meet enterprise needs, whether on-premises or in cloud environments. Our offerings include le Chat, the AI assistant for life and work.

We are a dynamic, collaborative team passionate about AI and its potential to transform society.

Our diverse workforce thrives in competitive environments and is committed to driving innovation. Our teams are distributed between France, USA, UK, Germany and Singapore. We are creative, low-ego and team-spirited.

Join us to be part of a pioneering company shaping the future of AI. Together, we can make a meaningful impact. See more about our culture on https://mistral.ai/careers.

Role Summary

- As our AI Deployment Strategist, you'll be the catalyst driving the adoption and scaling of cutting-edge AI solutions. It's a purely IC role
- You'll work at the intersection of innovation and impact, empowering businesses to leverage GenAI for transformative results
- You'll partner with Sales Executives in tailoring Mistral's offering into impactful solutions meeting with prospects needs
- You'll design implementation projects and scope the required resources on both Mistral and customer side

- You'll tackle complex business problems with AI, delivering measurable outcomes and strategic advantages
- You'll contribute to the evolution of AI technology, influencing how businesses operate and compete in the modern world
- You will travel approximately 30 to 60% of your time

What you will do

Pre-Sales & Sales Activities:

- Conduct pre-sales calls to understand potential clients' needs, challenges, and aspirations
- Lead qualification calls to pinpoint prospects who would gain the most from our solutions
- Collaborate with the sales team to advance the sale pipeline, providing technical expertise and insights where necessary

Product Implementation, Integration & Deployment:

- Guide and support customers in deploying our models and products into their infrastructure
- Work closely with customers to fine-tune models according to their specific requirements
- Assist clients in integrating our APIs into their front-end interfaces, ensuring a smooth user experience
- Regularly liaise with the product and technical teams to relay feedback and suggest improvements
- Design and develop product features that would meet the need of many customers

Customer Success & Support:

- Continually ensure that the customer is maximizing the product's potential
- Provide post-deployment support, addressing any issues or challenges that arise promptly
- Conduct periodic reviews with customers to ascertain their satisfaction and gather feedback
- Offer recommendations for product optimisations or new features based on customer feedback
- Develop these features if needed

Delivering value to the customers:

- Execute on effective technical discovery to understand potential clients' needs, challenges, and desired outcomes in collaboration with Account Executives
- Contribute to effectively identifying, qualifying, and disqualifying opportunities where Mistral solutions can unlock the most value for the customer
- On the project, Influence evaluation criteria and gain control of evaluations and the evaluation process
- Create a strategic vision for the customer on the project, based on a deep understanding of their strategy, desired positive business outcomes, and required capabilities

About You

- You hold a degree in a relevant scientific field (e.g., Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, etc.)

- Proven experience in product implementation in AI or machine learning products

title: Career & Employer Relations Manager
description:
About the jobThe Opportunity

You will be joining a global team of passionate Career Development Advisors who excel at coaching students to secure great jobs opportunities around the world. This role will be based out of our Dubai Campus, focusing on the UAE and wider GCC market in a lean, all hands-on deck operational environment. The role contains multiple priorities namely student advising, student engagement for events and initiatives and spotlighting the value of Hult Students to employers in the local job market.

You will be working with students to kickstart their early careers journeys in the region, whilst utilising your knowledge of globalised working trends, HR and recruitment best practices and understanding of the localised work culture in the GCC. You will draw on your excellent communication and job search strategy skills to deliver workshops, one- to- one advising sessions and contribute to building a robust network of employer partners to place Hult students each year.

Ability to use a creative approach and content creation skills to ensure engagement from students from a GenZ demographic will be key, coupled with a nothing is impossible mindset and desire to be part of a high growth, entrepreneurial business school.

This role reports to the Campus Dean and works closely with the Career Development and Employer Relations Postgraduate Team, the Undergraduate Program Management team and Undergraduate Student Development Coach and other academic and professional services teams.

Responsibilities

- Career Advising –Provide 1:1 coaching session to support students in identifying target jobs and establishing an action plan for achieving job success. Set student expectations and understanding the nuances of a competitive job market.
- Employer Relations - create and nurture strong relationships with key corporations, Ecosystems and nurture the Alumni community in Dubai and the wider MENA region to encourage the Hult hires Hult strategy, identifying employment pathways that make winning jobs and internships easier for students. 
- Event and Internship Management - Facilitate networking and career development events for students along with maintaining internship experience records.
- Market Readiness - Utilise AI tools to ensure students are “market ready” with their professional documentation and build a CV look book to distribute to the network. 
- Career Platform - Students have access to online tools and resources that allow them to learn at their own pace and on their own timeline. Contribute to update new resources and knowledge to the platform, and forward to students curated materials, insights and advise on an ongoing basis. 
- Relationship Building- Build a rapport with your students YOY in order to collect annual employment data and document their successes for rankings, employability and accreditations. 

Key Requirements

- Belief in and desire to participate in the Hult mission for educating, inspiring and empowering students from more than 150 different countries, to carve a career path in international business, and transform their lives and the lives of others in the process.
- 5 years’ experience of building recruitment expertise and best practices, most in demand roles and skills and overall market dynamics, regionally and nationally. Deep knowledge and network in one or more functional areas and/or one or more industry sectors is highly valued.
- Previous career advisory experience and knowledge of student development and career counselling practices is highly valued but not a showstopper - assessment tools, career planning models, career communications including social media, and job search execution.
- Previous end to end event management experience with proven operations / event facilitation / project management skills.
- Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
- Undergraduate degree required, everything additional including post graduate degrees, certificates, credentials, formal trainings is highly valued.
- Collegial and collaborative, able to work effectively across teams and campuses.

Mission statement

We strive to be the most relevant business school in the world. By using our global reach and always being creative, entrepreneurial, and on the cutting edge, our aim is to have a positive impact on individuals and organizations by transforming their management practices. In so doing, we hope to be the business school of choice for existing and aspiring leaders. We will contribute to sustainable growth, helping leaders to integrate commercial success and societal well-being.

Equal opportunities at Hult

Hult is dedicated to actively creating a diverse and inclusive environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We are looking to appoint and innovative and well qualified Alumni Engagement Manager, who will be responsible for leading the school’s fundraising initiatives and alumni relations programmes to support the long-term growth and sustainability of the British School Muscat (BSM) and British School Salalah (BSS). All applicants must be degree qualified.

The Role

The Alumni Engagement Manager is responsible for leading the school’s fundraising initiatives and alumni relations programmes to support the long-term growth and sustainability of the British School Muscat (BSM) and British School Salalah (BSS).

Reporting to the Director of Communications, this role focuses on building lasting relationships with the alumni community, managing philanthropic giving, and securing external investment. The post holder will foster a culture of giving and engagement that enhances the school’s facilities, bursary programmes, and educational innovation.

What We Offer

Our generous remuneration package includes:

- Competitive tax free salary 
- Accommodation Allowance 
- Utilities Allowance 
- International Medical Insurance 
- Annual Flight Allowance 
- Continuing Professional Development 
- Subsidised tuition for up to 3 Children at BSM 
- Management Allowances 
- Threshold 
- Freight Allowance 
- End of Service Gratuity

We provide a thorough school, social & country induction programme.

Start Date: September 2026.

Closing Date: Thursday 12 March 2026.

The ideal candidate will have excellent organisational and time management skills. All applicants must be degree qualified. Please visit our website to view the job description and person specification for further details. To apply, please send your BSM application form, CV and covering letter in PDF or word format by email to recruitment@britishschoolmuscat.com. Only complete applications will be considered.

British School Muscat is committed to safeguarding children and young people. Appointments to British School Muscat are subject to receiving three satisfactory professional references, online searches and police/ICPC checks.

The closing date is Thursday 12 March 2026. Applications will be reviewed as they are received and interviews could be arranged before the closing date. It is advisable to submit your application at the earliest opportunity. The school reserves the right to make an earlier appointment if a suitable candidate is identified.

Due to the continued success of our new school GEMS Founders School Dubai South, we are seeking a School Compliance Officer to join our team.

location: Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
description:
About the jobSky News Arabia, an IMI company, is a leading pan-Arab news organisation, broadcasting 24/7 across the Arabic-speaking world through a free-to-air TV channel, radio station, and a myriad of online platforms to bring audiences fast, accurate news and information. With nearly 400 dedicated staff and multimedia journalists, we operate from multiple bureaux across MENA, Europe, and the US, ensuring comprehensive coverage of breaking news, business, lifestyle, arts, culture, and sports. Sky News Arabia is also committed to empowering the next generation of media professionals through its training arm, Sky News Arabia Academy. Sky News Arabia is a joint venture between IMI and Sky UK.

Role Summary

The Head of AI Transformation & Innovation role requires extensive expertise in broadcast screen design and a strong passion for leveraging artificial intelligence technologies in modern newsroom environments.

The role is responsible for leading the AI-driven transformation of the newsroom through both strategic leadership and hands-on execution, actively shaping and supporting editorial, creative, and production workflows.

This position works closely with editorial, creative, digital, and broadcast operations teams to ensure a consistent, scalable, and integrated transformation across the entire newsroom ecosystem.

The role focuses on enabling the effective integration of advanced AI tools across research, writing, summarization, fact-checking, voice recording, editing, video production, graphics, and media sourcing, while applying proven best practices drawn from Sky News Arabia’s newsroom experience.

Key Responsibilities

1. AI Transformation & Workflow Innovation

- Develop and implement a comprehensive strategy to integrate AI tools across editorial, creative, and production workflows.
- Introduce AI-driven solutions for research, writing, summarization, fact-checking, and content optimization.
- Oversee the implementation of AI tools in voice recording, audio editing, automated video production, and rapid video assembly.
- Integrate AI-powered solutions into graphics, infographics, and motion graphics workflows.
- Establish automated systems for sourcing relevant videos and images to support editorial content.

2. Training, Support & Capacity Building

- Train journalists, editors, producers, and creative teams on effective and responsible use of AI tools.
- Develop and maintain a newsroom-wide AI best-practice and governance guide.
- Support cultural and operational change by enabling teams to confidently adopt new technologies.

3. Strategic & Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Act as a central point of coordination between editorial, creative, digital, broadcast operations, and technical teams.
- Ensure AI-driven workflows align with editorial standards, creative direction, and broadcast requirements.
- Continuously assess newsroom needs and recommend scalable, future-ready AI solutions.
- Apply proven models and learnings from Sky News Arabia to drive innovation and operational excellence.

Role Requirements

- Minimum 10 years’ experience in broadcast news, media production, or newsroom operations, with proven exposure to editorial and creative workflows.
- Bachelor’s degree in Media, Journalism, Digital Media, Creative Technologies, Computer Science, or a related field; postgraduate qualifications or AI-related certifications are an advantage.
- Demonstrated experience leading AI, digital, or workflow transformation initiatives within a newsroom or fast-paced media environment, combining strategic oversight with hands-on execution.
- Strong understanding of editorial standards, accuracy, verification, and content governance, with the ability to integrate AI tools without compromising credibility or quality.
- Practical experience with AI-enabled tools across research, writing, video, audio, graphics, and content automation.
- Proven ability to work cross-functionally with editorial, creative, digital, broadcast operations, and technical teams, driving adoption and change at scale.
- Experience in training, enablement, and change management, including developing best-practice guidelines and operational frameworks.… more

- Experience working with clinicians and hospital/healthcare environments is highly desirable

Education

- Master’s degree (MBA, MPH, MSc) is an advantage… more
