title: Chief Executive Officer
description:
About the jobFor one of our venture; Zamanat

About Zamanat

Zamanat is a Sharia-aligned investment bank built on blockchain infrastructure, pioneering the tokenization of alternative asset classes including private equity, venture capital, real estate, and secondaries. Our mission is to democratize access to institutional-grade investments while solving one of alternative investing's most persistent challenges: illiquidity and access.

By enabling fractional ownership and creating secondary liquidity pathways, Zamanat offers a compelling proposition for both emerging investors seeking access and traditional institutional capital (family offices, pension funds, sovereign wealth funds, HNWI/UHNWI) seeking flexibility beyond conventional 10-12 year lockup periods.

Zamanat launched on ZigChain, leveraging Disrupt.com's strategic position as a founding partner of the chain, with a roadmap toward multi-chain deployment aligned with institutional adoption patterns across global markets.

Role Overview

We are seeking an exceptional leader to join as Co-Founder and CEO/GM, taking full ownership of Zamanat's growth from inception through global scale. This is a rare opportunity to build a category-defining financial institution at the intersection of Islamic finance, blockchain infrastructure, and institutional capital markets. This role carries full executive responsibility for strategy, growth, governance, and performance.

The CEO/GM will be accountable for building Zamanat into a globally credible, institution‑grade investment bank driving asset sourcing and AUM growth, establishing distribution and liquidity channels, cultivating deep institutional relationships, shaping the brand and narrative, and assembling a high‑calibre team capable of executing at scale.

The Red Hat EMEA Technology Sales team is looking for a Senior AI Platform Specialist Solution Architect (SSA) to join our team in Dubai or remotely in UAE. This position assumes a crucial role in providing expert deep technical sales support for the seamless execution of Go-To-Market (GTM) strategies related to Red Hat AI within EMEA.

Your primary focus will be to remove organizational, technical, and competitive blockers of adoption within key accounts to become the preferred AI platform for workloads and applications across the business and help our customers leverage their proprietary data to gain a sustainable advantage over their competitors by helping them train, build, and manage applications that rely on these models.

You will need to be able to confidently articulate our value proposition to leadership, data scientists, developers, and IT teams within the account. This will entail technical architecture walk-throughs, business-value conversations, customer-facing technical workshops, and implementation of best practices in AI systems implementation and design.

You will work closely with the AI business unit and engineering, helping to test, document, and demonstrate cutting-edge features. You will also work in close collaboration with Red Hat customer sales, Customer Success, Consulting Services, and partner teams to ensure a highly positive customer experience.

title: Associate Manager - Foresight Research (UAE National)
description:
About the jobLife at Dubai Future Foundation

Dubai Future Foundation (DFF) aims to realize the wise vision of Dubai’s leadership to institutionalize the envisioned future and forward-thinking methodologies, while positioning Dubai as the leading city of the future. In partnership with its local and global partners from governments, companies, startups, and entrepreneurs, DFF drives joint efforts to collectively imagine, design, and execute the best possible future for humanity.

Under the supervision of His Highness Sheikh Hamdan bin Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum, Crown Prince of Dubai, Chairman of the Executive Council of Dubai, and Chairman of the Board of Trustees of DFF, the DFF runs and oversees many futureproofing projects and initiatives, such as the Museum of the Future, Area 2071, The Centre for the Fourth Industrial Revolution UAE, Dubai Future Accelerators, One Million Arab Coders, Dubai Future Academy, Dubai Future Solutions, Dubai Future Labs, Dubai Future Forum, etc. DFF’s efforts to share knowledge, adopt innovation, support entrepreneurs and innovative startups, build capacity, and promote forward-thinking and foresight principles contribute to Dubai’s ambitions to be a role model for the cities of the future through the power of unlimited imagination, innovation, foresight and disruptive mindset.

For more information on the initiatives, projects, and programs of Dubai Future Foundation, please visit the website: www.dubaifuture.ae

Where does this role fit into the bigger picture?

The Foresight Research team within the Dubai Future Institute focuses on achieving the Dubai Future Foundation’s objective to be recognized as a leader in innovation through delivering evidence-based research and driving cutting-edge thinking. The team acts as the opinion-forming part of the business, underpinned by sound research that advances regional and international knowledge including collaboration with Dubai Government Entities and the World Economic Forum. Research is designed to focus on the next generation of initiatives that will shape the future of Dubai.

Associate Manager Foresight Research

As a Dubai Future Foundation’s Associate Manager Foresight Research, you are thorough, practice due-diligence and be proactive about further developing your own expertise. As an Associate Manager at the Dubai Future Foundation, you will coordinate and manage foresight research projects that explore emerging and future technologies, policy and regulatory trends, and socio-economic shifts, and contribute to high-impact research.

You will support the research team by structuring research processes, managing evidence and documentation, carrying out elements of primary and secondary research, and overseeing smaller research initiatives.

This role will require a strong ability to synthesize data, manage research workflows, and coordinate between internal teams and external stakeholders to deliver impactful, high-quality research.

Project Management

- You will lead small to mid-sized research projects, ensuring timely execution, documentation, and quality control
- You will support the research team in structuring research workflows, from defining objectives to reporting findings
- You will manage project timelines, milestones, and deliverables, ensuring research outputs are delivered on schedule and with accuracy
- You will collaborate with research teams to define methodologies, scope, and key deliverables for different research initiatives
- You will support data collection, documentation, and synthesis, ensuring research materials are well-organized and accessible

Primary and Secondary Research

- You will conduct literature reviews, data collection, and comparative analysis across multidisciplinary topics
- You will support primary research efforts, including survey design, expert interviews, and stakeholder engagement
- You will extract insights from policy papers, academic research, think tank reports, and industry studies

Third Party Relationships

- You will build and maintain relationships with research institutions, think tanks, and technology partners
- You will attend and contribute to global foresight conferences, summits, and research forums
- You will support cross-sector research collaborations that leverage data analytics for future intelligence

Why this role is important?

This role makes the biggest impact by being curious and dedicated to developing research within a broadening field of expertise. You will be fact-driven, structured and passionate about creating published research. This role has a key impact in pushing the boundaries and positioning the Dubai Future Foundation as a Thought Leader both regionally and internationally.

What Dubai Future Foundation offers?

We will offer you a unique opportunity to work with passionate people, support shapers of the future as well as work that has an impact, not only on the organization or the UAE but all of humankind.

About the jobJob Description

About the Team

At Canva, we create tools that empower the world to design. Our mission is to democratize design and empower creativity for anyone and everyone, on every platform. Since launching in August 2013, Canva has grown exponentially — we're one of the world's fastest-growing startups, and the journey has only just begun.

International is becoming Canva's biggest growth driver in 2026 and beyond. To reach our foundational goal of having 1 in 5 internet users use Canva every month, we're shifting from translating English successes to implementing truly local strategies that resonate with and convert local audiences.

The SEO group spans the globe with keyword researchers, technical SEO specialists, content specialists, copywriters, engineers, data analysts, designers, and operations specialists. As the Arabic SEO Lead across key markets (Saudi Arabia, UAE, GCC, and Egypt), you'll be part of the Logged Out Experience (LOX) Group and International Supergroup, working in a dual alignment model — embedded in your region team locally while contributing to Central SEO globally.

About The Role

You’ll lead Canva’s SEO growth for Arabic across key markets (Saudi Arabia, UAE, GCC, and Egypt) — defining, executing, and scaling a strategy that reflects the unique realities of your market. This isn’t about following a global playbook; it’s about building one for your region.

You’ll own the end-to-end SEO strategy across technical, content, and authority-building pillars — verifying the opportunity, prioritising what matters, and delivering measurable growth in sessions, signups, and engagement.

Your goal is to help Canva reach 20% market penetration within the next 2–3 years, starting from our current 5%.

As the Arabic SEO Lead, you’ll operate at the intersection of local strategy and global systems. You’ll be embedded in your Country team as a strategic partner to your Region Manager, while also contributing to Canva’s centralised SEO engine within the Logged Out Experience (LOX) Group

You’ll be supported by a global network of experts — International SEO Leads, Technical SEOs, Product Managers, and Content Specialists — and have access to Canva’s proprietary SEO platforms and best-in-class third-party tools. You’ll also collaborate closely with your International SEO Strategist, who provides capability leadership, coaching, and alignment across markets.

Success in this role means running a high-performing, locally embedded SEO operation that:

- Achieves measurable impact and market penetration goals.
- Operates autonomously while aligned to Canva’s global systems and standards.
- Surfaces insights, innovations, and frameworks that help scale the Truly Local SEO model across 40+ markets.

You’ll thrive here if you’re both a strategist and an operator — equally comfortable running audits, leading discussions with your Region Manager, mentoring local SEOs, and proposing scalable solutions that improve how we grow internationally.

What You’ll Do

Strategic SEO Leadership

- Lead the end-to-end SEO strategy for Saudi Arabia, UAE, GCC, and Egypt, spanning technical, content, and authority pillars.

Team Building & Capability Development

- Define clear goals, rituals, and development plans to grow your team’s autonomy and impact.
- Foster a culture of ownership, curiosity, open communication and experimentation within your team and across the country organisation.

Market Expertise & Competitive Intelligence

- Become Canva’s definitive expert on the Arabic search landscape — platforms, user intent, competitors, and trends.
- Continuously analyse search behaviour, market signals, and competitive activity to uncover new opportunities and influence the MENA roadmap.
- Validate local hypotheses through data and user insights, ensuring every initiative has measurable rationale.

Content & Localisation Strategy

- Prioritise and optimise high-impact categories, combining English-to-local localisation with bespoke content creation.
- Collaborate with central teams to leverage scalable systems (creator templates, internal linking, AI tools) while tailoring them for local impact.

title: D&C - Digital Strategy and Realization - Digital Government Strategy- Senior Manager
description:
About the jobWhy PwC

At PwC, your growth is our priority. We fuel potential through coaching, feedback, and challenging work that helps you build a career path as unique as you are. You’re not just joining a team—you’re becoming part of a movement that’s shaping the future. Here, you can be yourself, work with purpose and boldness, and collaborate with talented people to deliver solutions that create real impact for clients and communities. Powered by inclusive teams, cutting-edge technology, and truly meaningful work, you’ll find endless opportunities to grow, lead, and go further.

Together, we set the future in motion.

Consulting LoS

At PwC Consulting, we lead with insight and deliver with purpose. You’ll work alongside experts across industries to design and deliver forward-looking solutions in areas such as strategy and enterprise transformation, operational excellence, digital innovation, cyber resilience, and risk management. Our reimagined operating model brings together sector-aligned, solution-led teams empowered to move fast, think boldly, and create real impact. Whether transforming finance, enabling digital change, or shaping national visions, you’ll be part of a collaborative, forward-thinking community—built to grow with you and the world around us.

BU Description

The Digital & Cyber Business Unit brings together deep technology expertise and bold thinking to help organizations thrive in a connected, data-driven world. We support clients in reimagining how they operate, serve, and grow—by harnessing the power of digital products, emerging tech, cloud, data, and cyber resilience.

Whether shaping enterprise-wide transformation or enabling targeted innovation, we work at the intersection of strategy, technology, and trust—delivering scalable solutions that empower clients to move faster, think smarter, and lead with confidence.

Job Summary

We are seeking an experienced Digital Government Transformation Expert to lead the development and implementation of digital government strategies. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in digital government indices, including the United Nations E-Government Development Index (EGDI), and a proven track record in assessing and designing digital government services, architectures, and platforms. This role requires a strong understanding of the latest digital technology trends such as AI, IoT, Mixed Reality, Cloud Computing, and their implications on government operations. The candidate will leverage these technologies to identify and design feasible yet innovative use cases that drive public sector transformation. Additionally, this role will require extensive experience in developing digital government policies, guidelines, and standards, enabling governments to drive innovation while maintaining effective governance.

Roles & Responsibilities

Roles & Responsibilities

Develop and Implement Digital Government Strategies: Work with central and local government entities to develop tailored digital transformation strategies, focusing on improving service delivery, operational efficiency, and citizen engagement.

Leverage Global Indices: Utilize a deep understanding of global digital government indices (e.g., UN EGDI) to help governments enhance their rankings and achieve global leadership in digital governance.

Strategic Goal Setting: Define and implement strategic goals for digital transformation, ensuring clear alignment with government objectives and international standards.

Assess and Design Digital Government Services, Architecture, and Platforms: Lead the assessment and design of comprehensive digital architectures across all layers, including digital government services, customer journeys and experiences, digital platforms, systems integrations, data management, and infrastructure. Ensure that the architecture is scalable, secure, and aligned with strategic goals.

Digital Platform Innovation: Design and recommend digital platforms that support government objectives, ensuring interoperability, scalability, and alignment with best practices in digital service delivery.

Technology Trends and Innovation: Stay abreast of the latest digital technologies including AI, IoT, Mixed Reality, Cloud Computing, and others. Use this knowledge to identify innovative use cases and solutions that enhance government service delivery and operations. Provide guidance on how these technologies can be feasibly integrated within the government context.

Educational Qualifications & Certifications

 Education & Qualifications 

Educational Background: A degree in a relevant field such as Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related disciplines. Graduates in other fields can apply, provided that they have a proven experience in IT / Digital Consulting practice with relevant certifications

A postgraduate degree such as an MBA or a Master's in Public Policy or Digital Transformation is desirable.

Certifications (Optional but Highly Preferred)

title: AI Integrator
description:
About the jobAbout the Company

We are PTD Fitness — Dubai's premium mobile personal training company, serving 11,000+ clients across Dubai and Abu Dhabi. We are building AI-powered systems to automate and scale our operations — from AI appointment setters and lead qualification agents to automated marketing and customer journey orchestration.

About the Role

We are hiring an AI Integrator — a rare, elite-level technical role for someone who lives and breathes OpenClaw, agentic AI, and modern AI integration frameworks. This is not a generic software engineering position. This is a mission-critical hire for someone who can single-handedly architect, build, and deploy production-grade AI agent systems that drive real business outcomes.

Responsibilities

- You will be the technical backbone of our AI infrastructure.
- You will own everything — from designing multi-agent orchestration pipelines and integrating Claude API, to building RAG systems with vector databases and automating entire business workflows with AI.
- You will report directly to the founder, operate with full technical autonomy, and have the freedom to choose your tools, design your architecture, and build systems your way.
- You will work extensively with OpenClaw — the cutting-edge AI agent framework — to design and deploy intelligent, autonomous agent systems.
- You will architect multi-agent systems where multiple AI agents collaborate, reason, and execute complex tasks.
- You will build agent orchestration pipelines, implement agent memory systems, design fallback chains across multiple LLM providers, and create AI agents that can plan, act, and learn from their environment.
- You will integrate and optimize multiple Large Language Model (LLM) APIs at a deep, production level.
- You will design and deploy Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines that give our AI agents access to real-time knowledge.
- You will build production-grade integrations with the platforms and APIs that power modern business.
- You will translate business goals into automated, AI-powered systems.
- You will own the full deployment and infrastructure stack.

Qualifications

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, AI, Machine Learning, or equivalent hands-on experience.

Required Skills

- Deep understanding of OpenClaw or equivalent agentic AI frameworks.
- Production experience with Claude — function calling, tool use, extended thinking, vision API, streaming, prompt caching.
- Real-world experience integrating and deploying LLMs (Claude, GPT, Gemini) in production applications.
- Experience designing systems where multiple AI agents collaborate, with agent orchestration and coordination.
- Strong backend development — FastAPI, Flask, or Django.
- Backend development with modern JavaScript/TypeScript for real-time AI applications.
- Production RAG pipelines with Qdrant, Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, or FAISS.
- Advanced prompt engineering — token optimization, context window management, cost optimization.
- RESTful API architecture, WebSocket, webhook design, and API authentication (OAuth 2.1, JWT).
- SQL, PostgreSQL, and/or Supabase — schema design, queries, migrations.
- Experience implementing conversation history, long-term memory, and context persistence for AI agents.

title: Product Growth - MENA (Localization in Arabic)
description:
About the jobJob Description

About the Team

The Localisation group is responsible for the localisation of Canva’s product, marketing, and content as well as the tools, processes, and assets that make this possible. We sit within the International Supergroup but we work closely with stakeholders in Growth and across the whole organisation. Our mission is to celebrate the diversity of our global users and make their interactions with Canva delightful by delivering a hyperlocalised experience.

You will be part of a small but powerful MENA team and there will be lots of opportunities to collaborate with many other specialities beyond localisation so we value energy and adaptability over specific experience or years of experience.

About The Role

Every month, more than 100 million Canva users create a design in one of the 100 languages other than English, that Canva supports. The Localisation specialty is a small team of linguists, project managers, and engineers distributed throughout the company.

As a Localisation Partner for MENA, you'll bring your cultural and linguistic knowledge to all aspects of localisation, ensuring our users have the best possible Canva experience in English, Arabic and potentially French.

You will be the voice of Middle Eastern users and the champion for culturally relevant content.

What You’ll Do

- Identify key opportunities for localisation improvements for MENA markets
- Collaborate with local team on Product Growth initiatives
- Tailor education content for the nuances of MENA markets
- Evaluate and adapt global messaging, campaigns, and product experiences to resonate with MENA users
- Provide cultural insights and guidance to global teams to produce content that suits MENA audiences
- Work closely with local partners to ensure clarity, tone, and cultural nuance across all surfaces
- Partner with internal stakeholders to develop language style guides, tone of voice strategies for different Arabic variants, and localisation best practices
- Define a linguistic strategy for Arabic variants across GCC and North Africa

After 6 Months You Will Have

- Established relationships with key stakeholders in the local team, marketing, product, content, and localisation
- Audited all user flows and advocated for RTL improvements across Canva product
- Created processes for communicating best practices and completing internal requests such as user flow audits and content reviews
- Developed strategies for adapting global campaigns and product surfaces to the MENA audience

What We're Looking For

You understand the needs of MENA customers and the opportunities to meet those needs effectively. You must be an Arabic speaker and fully understand the nuances between different cultures and dialects.

We’re also looking for someone with tertiary experience in conversion rate optimisation seeing as the job entails improving the success rates across all of our landing pages and user workflows for the Arabic speaker.

We’re open to candidates from a range of backgrounds, and valuable experience could include localisation or internationalisation work, content design, product growth. Previous experience working for a SaaS or technology company is also highly valued.

You’re passionate about language and culture and you understand how these can impact local users’ experience of a product. Above all else, you care deeply about creating experiences that feel natural and intuitive so that Canva resonates with MENA users and feels like home for them. Your analytical mindset helps you evaluate campaign effectiveness and recommend data-driven improvements for optimising user experiences.

You thrive in flat, collaborative environments where ideas can come from anywhere and success is a shared effort. You also love taking things from chaos to clarity. You’re a natural at understanding ambiguous, complex problems and communicating them simply to others. You also have the drive to see things through despite changes and setbacks. You’re equally comfortable discussing detail with engineers and ideas with product managers and designers. You’re great with tech (Atlassian project management tools, basic web development) and you write a mean doc.

Also, we’d love it if you had the following but it’s not a prerequisite!

- Knowledge of product growth strategies and user acquisition in MENA
- Experience in marketing or advertising in the MENA market
- You’ve got a tertiary education in conversion rate optimisation, literature, or localisation
- You have copy-writing experience — you maintain a blog or, even better, you have experience in localisation for a SaaS product
- You showcase a solid understanding of organic growth (SEO and Wordpress)
- You have some design experience
- You’re an expert with CAT tools (experience with Smartling gets full marks but not a must)… more

We’re looking for someone who can turn emerging technologies into large‑scale, production‑ready capabilities with strong delivery practices and operational rigor. You’ll work closely with teams across the business while also operating independently to drive outcomes. title: Director of Investor Relations
company_industry: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
description:
About the jobCompany Overview

Empyrean Sky Partners (ESP) is a venture capital firm and incubator focused on the AI-enabled robotics ecosystem and frontier technologies. We partner with founders from day one, working hands-on to transform breakthrough ideas into scaled and commercially viable products. Our incubation model is purpose-built to bridge the gap between innovation and realworld deployment – integrating deep engineering and productization expertise with operational support across manufacturing, supply chain and go-to-market execution. Companies built within the ESP platform have consistently achieved industry-leading productization timelines, progressing from concept to mass production in as little as six months. We invest in founders, teams and technologies that expand human creativity and productivity. Our focus is on building businesses designed for lasting and meaningful impact. We empower sky-high ambitions.

Position Summary

ESP is seeking an experienced Investor Relations professional to join its global platform.

The ideal candidate will have a strong background in private equity or venture capital, proven experience in fundraising and limited partner (LP) relationship management, and the ability to engage effectively with global institutional investors.

This role combines strategic execution with deep investor engagement, serving as a critical bridge between our investment platform and international LP community.

Key Responsibilities

Investor Relations & Communication

1.Serve as the primary point of contact for existing and prospective limited partners (LPs), ensuring consistent, transparent, and insightful communication.

2.Prepare and deliver investor materials, including quarterly reports, market updates, and fund performance summaries.

3.Support the planning and execution of annual investor meetings, global roadshows, and conference calls.

Fundraising & Business Development

1.Develop and implement fundraising strategies targeting institutional investors, family offices, and corporate LPs across global markets.

2.Develop and refine institutional marketing materials (pitch decks, DDQs, data room materials, etc.) to effectively communicate the fund’s strategy and track record.

3.Manage the end-to-end fundraising process from investor engagement to commitment close.

Due Diligence & Internal Coordination

1.Lead due diligence processes and coordinate with investment, finance, and legal teams to provide timely, accurate information to LPs.

2.Maintain a deep understanding of the fund’s strategy, portfolio, and performance drivers to communicate confidently with investors.

3.Act as the “voice of the investor” internally, providing feedback and market insights to support fund strategy and positioning.

Qualifications

1.5–10 years of Investor Relations or Fundraising experience within private equity or venture capital, especially USD funds.

2.Strong understanding of global LP ecosystems, fundraising cycles, and investor expectations.

3.Proven track record in developing and maintaining relationships with institutional investors, family offices, and other capital partners.

4.Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English; additional languages are a plus.

5.Independent, self-motivated, and results-driven with strong business negotiation and cross-cultural communication skills.

6.Bachelor’s degree or above; international education or professional experience preferred.

Compensation & Benefits

1.Highly competitive compensation package, including base salary and performance-based bonuses linked to fundraising outcomes and AUM growth.

2.Flexible working arrangements, with the option to be based in global financial hubs.

3.Professional development opportunities, including participation in leading private equity and venture capital investor conferences worldwide.

title: UA Manager
description:
About the jobThis position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a UA Manager in United Arab Emirates.

We are seeking a highly analytical and performance-driven User Acquisition Manager to lead and scale paid acquisition campaigns for consumer mobile apps. This role is critical in driving efficient user growth, optimizing acquisition spend, and maximizing ROI across multiple mobile and web channels. You will work closely with product, creative, and analytics teams to execute data-driven campaigns, test new growth strategies, and maintain strong performance metrics. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, high-expectation environment, brings a test-and-learn mindset, and is passionate about scaling user growth while ensuring sustainable monetization. This position is fully remote, offering flexibility while contributing to global product expansion and strategic growth initiatives.

Accountabilities

- Plan, launch, and optimize user acquisition campaigns across major channels, including Meta, Google, TikTok (SRNs/SANs), programmatic DSPs, and rewarded ad networks.
- Monitor daily performance, pacing, and spend efficiency to achieve KPIs such as CPI, CPA, ROAS, and LTV.
- Scale campaigns while maintaining efficient acquisition costs and revenue metrics.
- Run A/B and multivariate tests on creatives, messaging, ad formats, and funnels to continuously improve results.
- Analyze campaign data to extract actionable insights and identify optimization opportunities.
- Partner with creative teams to develop, test, and iterate high-performing ad concepts.
- Stay current with UA trends, platform updates, attribution changes, and emerging channels.
- Contribute to the growth playbook, exploring new channels, formats, and markets for user and revenue growth.

Requirements

The ideal candidate combines hands-on performance marketing experience with strong analytical skills and a collaborative mindset:

- 1–4 years of hands-on mobile UA buying experience for consumer apps, games, utilities, or subscription products, ideally with in-app monetized products.
- Proven experience managing campaigns on Meta, Google, TikTok, programmatic DSPs, and rewarded ad networks.
- Strong analytical skills, fluent in Excel or Google Sheets, and familiarity with tools like MixPanel, Google Analytics, Looker, Tableau, or Singular.
- Experience with MMPs and performance marketing attribution.
- Ability to collaborate effectively with product, monetization, and creative teams.
- Strong communication and reporting skills, capable of translating insights into actionable recommendations.
- Bonus Skills:
- Experience with ASO, web-to-app flows, rewarded traffic, or viral growth strategies.
- Curiosity, accountability, and action-oriented mindset aligned with core values of thoroughness, care, and continuous learning.

Benefits

This remote-first role provides flexibility and growth opportunities in a dynamic, global environment:

- Fully remote work with flexible schedule and autonomy.
- Competitive compensation package with performance bonuses.
- Participation in company equity plans (for full-time team members).
- Generous PTO, wellness days, and company holidays.
- Remote social activities and team recognition programs.
- Opportunities to shape and scale high-growth products on a global scale.
- Collaborative, inclusive, and mission-driven culture with a focus on learning and career growth.

About the jobAbout noon 

We’re building an ecosystem of digital products and services that power everyday life across the Middle East—fast, scalable, and deeply customer-centric. Our mission is to deliver to every door every day. 

Who are we?

Everyday Labs is noon’s innovation engine — a place built to imagine, build, and scale new ideas that create real value for users, for noon, and for the world. Our mission is simple: turn imagination into measurable impact. We explore new technologies, test new business models, and launch products that push noon’s ecosystem forward with speed, clarity, and purpose.

We’re looking for an entrepreneurial builder — someone who thrives in ambiguity, moves fast, and can take an idea from zero to launch with full ownership. title: Cloud Data Architect (24M)
location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
description:
About the jobSynopsis

Responsible for designing and developing data solutions for Data Agile Release Train, ensuring the alignment of solution designs conforming to architectural standards, business requirements, budgets & strategy

Accountabilities

- Works within Enterprise Data Management (EDM) / DART to create solutions and technology designs, develop standards, and build architecture runways, especially for Azure-based platforms using services like Azure Data Factory (ADF), Synapse, and Databricks.
- Works closely with Technology & Architecture to ensure the solutions defined & developed align with the agreed technology roadmaps, business capabilities, technology strategy and are implemented as designed.
- Ensures solution and technology architecture standards, governance and principles are implemented effectively using the Etihad Architecture Frameworks and Tools.
- Develops the design and implementation of solution architecture as part of both agile and waterfall delivery, enabling innovation, cost efficiency, strategy alignment and speed to market.
- Ensures solution and technology architecture assets that are developed for Value Streams are aligned to the DTI strategy and are compliant with the enterprise’s future state architecture.
- Responsible for developing emergent design, intentional design, model driven design, solution context and solution design that meets the business requirements, strategy and vision, standards and principles.
- Provides consultation to the product and project delivery teams, identifying ways to apply new or existing technologies to support business initiatives, innovation, facilitating the reuse of ideas, components, services, and proven patterns.
- Defines and develops solution & technology architecture value accelerators, patterns, standards, enablers and digital technology transformation within EDM / DART to ensure alignment with enterprise-wide architecture.

Education & Experience

- Solution architecture and technology expertise with a minimum of 7 years of experience in complex IT architecture environments. Airline industry experience strongly desirable.
- Track record of delivering architecture solutions for data warehouse, big data, business intelligence and data science initiatives.
- Hands-on data modelling experience; familiarity with airline data (e.g. PNR, TKT, etc.) strongly desirable.
- Strong practical knowledge and experience of concepts such as data lineage, data quality, data lifecycle management, reference data management, metadata management.
- Hands-on experience in building and managing data platforms using services like Azure Data Factory (ADF), Databricks, Synapse, and Cosmos DB, with expertise in building data pipelines and data lakes.
- Familiarity with data security and data privacy concepts and concerns.
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related degree is desirable. One or more Certification in Solution and/or Enterprise Architecture mandatory – e.g. TOGAF, SAFe Architect, Open Certified Architect, ISEB Architecture, UML or ArchiMate
- Experience in seeking the alignment of business and IT, driving common approaches, delivering sustainable, re-usable solutions using both agile and waterfall.

About Etihad Airways

Etihad Airways, the national airline of the UAE, was formed in 2003 and quickly went on to become one of the world’s leading airlines. From its home in Abu Dhabi, Etihad flies to passenger and cargo destinations in the Middle East, Africa, Europe, Asia, Australia and North America. Together with Etihad’s codeshare partners, Etihad’s network offers access to hundreds of international destinations. In recent years, Etihad has received numerous awards for its superior service and products, cargo offering, loyalty programme and more. All this ties into Etihad’s ambitious Journey 2030 strategy. The airline plans to double its fleet size and triple the number of customers over the next six years as it sets out to be the airline everyone wants to fly!

To learn more, visit etihad.com

Recruitment Fraud Alert

Beware of fraudulent job offers from individuals or organizations claiming to represent the Etihad group. We will never ask for personal information, bank details, or payment during the recruitment process. Interviews are conducted face-to-face or via video/telephone before any formal offer. If you are asked for money, please treat it as fraudulent.… more
